headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Shareholders Approve Paramount Skydance Merger, Reject Exec Pay Vote
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (NASDAQ:WBD) stockholders voted to approve the company’s proposed merger agreement with Paramount Skydance Corporation at a special meeting held virtually, while rejecting an advisory proposal related to merger-linked executive compensation, according to preliminary results pr
